title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: crypto-policies bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for crypto-policies is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: Enable PQ crypto in DEFAULT crypto policy
Enable PQC algorithms in FIPS mode
Enable support for ML-DSA in GnuTLS
*P:Q/*class:ics - use new openssl group selection syntax in crypto-policies
Update crypto policies to support PQC in sequoia
X25519-MLKEM768 should be aliased to MLKEM768-X25519
enable ML-DSA in NSS in crypto-policies
Enable the mlkem1024secp384r1 group for NSS
allow PQ algorithms in all rpm-sequoia crypto-policies
crypto-policies in RHEL 10.1 should obsolete crypto-policies-pq-preview

full_text:
An update for crypto-policies is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
